column1: # Source: VDA ISA 6.0.4 risk chapter crosswalk.

column9: Information security risk assessment — ISO 27005 Clause 7 covers identification, analysis and evaluation.
Risk identification (Clause 7.2) — direct implementation of TISAX INF-5.1 asset/threat/vulnerability identification.
Risk analysis (Clause 7.3) — likelihood and impact per TISAX matrix.
Risk evaluation (Clause 7.4) — risks compared against TISAX AL2/AL3 thresholds.
Context establishment (Clause 6) — TISAX requires defined scope and criteria.
Risk treatment options (Clause 8.2) — modify, retain, avoid, share.
Residual risk acceptance (Clause 8.3) — formal acceptance required by TISAX.
Risk monitoring and review (Clause 10) — TISAX requires periodic risk reviews.
Information security policy — Clause 9 communication and consultation as supporting discipline.
